_comment: POST /api/v1/applications/gitopsapi/enable — re-enable gitopsapi on gitopsdev (uncomments Kustomization)
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Host: gitopsgui.podzone.cloud' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: cluster-operators' -d @applications/gitopsapi-enable.json http://freyr:8081/api/v1/applications/gitopsapi/enable
